DR_Segmentation_UNet_DeepLabV3.description: Comparative study on 2 different architectures on segmenting Diabetic Retinopathy's fundus lesion images.

HandGestureSystem.display_name: Hand Gesture Recognition for IoT Control
HandGestureSystem.description: A Deep Learning-powered system that translates real-time hand signs into actionable commands for IoT devices, utilizing MobileNetV2 for fast and efficient edge processing.

StuntingApp.description: Web Blogspot based app made for Desa Panyingkiran with the purpose of detecting stunted growth from the most accessible device within your surroundings.

MobAppOTP.description: A mobile app made to test the capabilites of cloud based OTP tokens by using Firebase. The app was made using Flutter and Dart.

Boolean-Retriaval-System.description: An information retrieval system based on boolean operations (AND, OR, NOT) using news articles dataset as the source.

Genetic-Algorithm-Regression-Model.description: A regression model used to analyzed the steam market chart of CS:GO weapon skins. The algorithm could also be repurposed to analyze stock market.

MultiDiseaseClassification_ML.description: A machine learning model with the purpose of classifcating multiple diseases based on their factors. It is also a study on which algorithm performs better compared to the others using dataset from kaggle.

Covid-19-Dasboard-App.description: Made a web based dashboard app to highlight and give data visualizations from the covid 19 pandemic like mortality rate, survivality rate, etc.

QuizzAppScalable.description: A web based quiz app made to test the scalability feature of Redis database system by emulating user tokens.
